tasks.label: compile-latex
tasks.command: xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex && biber main && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex

tasks.label: compile-latex-2
tasks.command: xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex && biber main && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex

tasks.label: compile-after-remove-subtable
tasks.command: xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex && biber main && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex

tasks.label: compile-after-math-env-insert
tasks.command: xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex && biber main && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -shell-escape main.tex
